# Welcome to DSA Handbook Discussions!

**Hello everyone!** 👋

This is the official space for the **[DSA Handbook](https://aryagorjipour.github.io/dsa)** — a comprehensive, no-nonsense guide to Data Structures and Algorithms with full implementations in **C#** and **Go**, real-world use cases, and motivating problems for every topic.

## What is this project?

- 35+ Data Structures explained from the ground up
- 48 Algorithms with complete code and canonical problems
- Every concept includes time/space complexity, intuition, and production examples
- Runnable examples in `examples/` folder
- Companion project: [Structura](https://aryagorjipour.github.io/structura/) (an interactive RPG-style way to practice these concepts)

## How to use these Discussions

We have organized categories to keep things useful:

### 📢 Announcements
Official updates from maintainers only. New chapters, major improvements, or important notices.

### ❓ Q&A
Ask questions about any data structure or algorithm. Got stuck on an implementation? Don't understand a complexity analysis? Ask here.

### 💡 Ideas & Feedback
Suggest new topics, better explanations, more examples in a specific language, or improvements to the site/handbook.

### 🛠️ Show & Tell
Share your own implementations, visualizations, projects that use these structures, or how the handbook helped you (interviews, work, learning, etc.).

### 📚 Resources
Share great external articles, videos, papers, tools, or courses related to DSA.

### 💬 General
Anything else that doesn't fit the other categories.

## Getting Started

- 📖 Read the handbook: https://aryagorjipour.github.io/dsa
- 💻 Source code & examples: https://github.com/Aryagorjipour/dsa
- 🎮 Try the interactive companion: https://aryagorjipour.github.io/structura/

We're building this to be one of the best free, practical DSA resources available. Contributions, questions, and discussions are very welcome!

Let's learn together.

— Arya

---

**P.S.** If you're new, start here: [What is a Data Structure?](https://aryagorjipour.github.io/dsa/fundamentals/00-what-is-a-data-structure)
